message:
chore(conformance): regenerate all conformance and evidence artifacts

Regenerate conformance artifacts to reflect IO vtable stub conversions
(16 symbols moved from GlibcCallThrough to Implemented, native
coverage 96.7% → 97.1%) and proof binder counterexample support:

- proof_binder_validation.v1.json: add counterexamples field, advance
  PO-10 (HJI Viability) from planned to in_progress
- stub_priority_ranking.json: full re-ranking after stdio_abi,
  pthread_abi, locale_abi removed from non-implemented list
- stub_todo_debt_census.v1.json: updated SHA256 and summary totals
  (total_exported_declared → 3980)
- support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json: Implemented 3441→3457,
  GlibcCallThrough 133→117, reclassified 5→16

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
